title: The Mischief Moles and the Plane of Fire
summary: The Mischief Moles family—Papa Mole, Disco, and Thisco—are visited by Seeker, a mysterious tiny man who tasks them with mapping magical realms. Choosing a fire-themed potion, the family is transported to the intense Plane of Fire. Braving the extreme heat with a magically summoned air conditioner, they soon face an erupting volcano. To survive, the moles dig a deep tunnel and pass the time by telling stories of other planes, such as the Plane of Grass and the Plane of Mud. Once the eruption ends, a mystical flame bird appears and guides them toward the summit of the volcano to complete their cartographic mission.

highlightQuote.text: There's an air conditioning at home. I can bring it here. And I hurried back to my house and came back with a large air conditioner.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: To make stars.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That's a good idea. And I have another idea, which is we'll keep your drawing, but we'll flip this over...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But I don't think that would...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Let's try, let's try and see if it works.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But Dad, so maybe...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now once upon a time, the Mischief Moles were having an afternoon nap in their burrow.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Papa Mole says wake up Mischief Moles, it's time to do mischief.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And also said Papa Mole, Papa Mole says 'Do mischief, do mischief Moles, it's time to do mischief. Mischief Moles, do mischief, do mischief.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Disco and Thisco said 'Yes, let's do mischief.' And all of a sudden, all three of them—Papa and Disco and Thisco—turned to look at the door because they heard a [knocking sound].

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they said 'I wonder who that could be?' And Papa Mole says 'I think I know, it might be an old friend of mine.' And he went and opened the door and he said 'Haha, it is! Hello!'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they saw a face, not of a little creature, but of someone kind of like a person, with a big red beard—not like Daddy's beard but long all the way down to the chest, with braids and beads in the beard.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the person said 'Hello, my name is Seeker.' And Seeker was a person, so he was bigger than the moles, but he was very small for a person. He was almost more like Isabella's size. And he was wearing a beautiful red coat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And he looked around inside the burrow and he said 'What a beautiful mole hole you have. I'm afraid I'm too large to come in, but I wonder if you'd like to come out, because I have in mind for you a very mischievous mission. I need your help to make a map. Do you know how to do that, Disco and Thisco? Can you help me make a map?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now there's new stars.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yes, you changed the stars.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Disco and Thisco said 'Why yes, we love making maps! We've made a map of the whole forest all around our mole house.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Papa Mole said 'But I wonder if my friend Seeker, he's not talking about a map of the forest.' And Seeker said 'That's right, I have a very special mission to go to a faraway place. And I have these three magic potions, and you can choose which one you want to drink, and they will take you, each one, to a very different magical place to make a map.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: One of them—and he swirled it around and it was all sparkling and bright glowing red—'This is a place you can go that's made of fire.' And then he swirled another one: 'This one is a world of water.' And he swirled another one that [clinked]: 'This is a world of ice, it was full of ice and snow.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now which would you like to go to? The world of fire, the world of water, or the world of ice to make a map of it? Which do you choose, Moles?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We choose... we like everything! So... so Papa Mole picks fire.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Fire! Ah, brave moles, that is the most challenging one of all, but I think you will find it very interesting. And Disco said...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Water.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, well you can only choose one, but you can do them all one at a time, how about that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: So today we will do fire. Okay. Now here is the fire potion. You must each drink a tiny sip of this fire potion.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Drink, drink, drink.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Papa Mole drank a sip, and Disco drank a sip, and Thisco drank a sip, and it tasted very warm and sparkly and cinnamon-y.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker said 'I will not be joining you, but when you go to the plane of fire, you must make for me a map of three different places that you can find, and draw a picture of them on the map. And then to come home, you must drink a sip of this little potion.' And it was clean pure water. 'Here, you take it Papa Mole.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And now, to go to the plane of fire, we must all close our eyes and speak the chant: 'Higher and higher to the plane of fire.' Now chant it with me and close your eyes. 'Higher and higher to the plane of fire.' One more time. I don't hear you. 'Higher and higher to the plane of fire!'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And suddenly there was a burst of light—Bush!—and everything went all sparkly and red. And Disco and Thisco and Papa Mole found themselves in a very hot place: the Plane of Fire. And they were surrounded all around them with the hottest things they could think of. What are some hot things?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Volcano! Volcanoes! There was a volcano right in front of them.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what else did they see that was super hot?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Water.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They saw a campfire, and that was right in front of them. And what else was super hot?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I touch it like this, it's hot.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, a bright light can be hot! That's right. And there were bright lights floating through the air all around them glowing, and as they got close to the moles they felt the heat, the heat on their skin, it was so hot. And Papa Mole said 'We must be careful not to get too hot here.' And Disco and Thisco said 'But how can we cool down?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There's an air conditioning at home. I can bring it here. And I hurried back to my house and came back with a large air conditioner.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Papa Mole said 'Thank you!' And then it turns on the red button and washed down all the yucky air.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then it bring out cool air.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Disco and Thisco said 'Thank goodness, we were starting to get way too hot here on the plane of fire, but that air conditioner's nice and cool.' And Papa Mole said 'It's kind of heavy but I guess we better carry it around.' And Disco said 'What are we here to do again?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Make a map.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yeah! And we're supposed to make a map of three places. Huh. Well, where should we go?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Thisco said 'What's that big pointy mountain over there? It's kind of making a little bit of a rumbling sound... rumble rumble rumble.' And it's starting to shake a little bit... shake shake shake.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I think let's go back home.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh is that a little bit scary? I think it's a volcano and it's gonna erupt! We better make sure that we're safe, we just need to find shelter, something to protect us.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I built tunnels!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You're right! The best shelter for a mole is a tunnel. And so all the moles, Disco and Thisco and Papa Mole, dug a tunnel... dig dig dig. And it's a good thing they thought of that idea because they dug as fast as they could, and then they were safe underground. And you know what they heard? The biggest sound they'd ever heard: Boom!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then they closed the door.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They closed the door of their tunnel so they'd be very safe, because the volcano...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And the window.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the window. The volcano erupted: Boom! And the rocks and the hot red glowing lava sprayed into the air from the top of the volcano and it flew out into the sky and made clouds of gray dust and black smoke and rocks and lava spewed everywhere.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And all the creatures on the plane of fire were running and fleeing and running away, but the moles... they were safe.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They were cozy in their burrow.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And the baby mole was safe inside the house.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The baby mole said 'Thank goodness I'm a mole because we're safe underground, aren't we Papa Mole?' And Papa Mole said 'Yes Baby Mole, we did a very good job making a safe burrow.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so they stayed there for a little while and they told stories to wait while the volcano was erupting so they wouldn't be afraid. And what did they tell stories about?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Moles.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They told stories about moles.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Named Snisko, Fisko, and Misko.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the moles Snisko, Fisko, and Misko, and what did they do in the story?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Exploring a plane.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, which plane did they explore?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Plane of grass.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The plane of grass is a beautiful place. It has enormous fields of grass that stretch as far as you can see. And the moles ran and ran and ran, and they loved the plane of grass and it smelled so nice.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so, as Papa Mole finished the story about the plane of grass...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They did the plane of mud.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They did the plane of mud? Was that another story they told?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What happens on the plane of mud?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Your feet get sticky as you dig for bugs.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Your feet get so sticky on the plane of mud, and everything is mud.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And you dig for bugs.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And you dig for bugs because the plane of mud has lots of bugs, that's true.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I didn't find an ant.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh there's no ants on the plane of mud, that's too bad.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I didn't find any ants on the playground.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You didn't? No. Sometimes they're hard to find.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so, as Papa Mole finished telling his stories about the plane of grass and the plane of mud, he looked up and looked around and sniffed the air and he put his paw to his ear to listen. And you know what he heard? All was quiet.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then he heard a little tiny sound: Cur-caw! Cur-caw!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Papa Mole said 'I wonder if that's a flame bird. I think it might be. That means the volcano's done erupting if the flame bird came out. Would you like to go out and see it?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so, Disco and Thisco and Papa Mole and Baby Mole too, and Izzy the kiddo, they came out of their safe burrow.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I have a superhero... I have a superhero song that I could play in the morning if another volcano erupts in the morning.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That's a good idea. How does that go?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's just a song like from Danny Go!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh from Danny Go, yeah. That's a good one. Does that help you feel brave?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I think that does. And Mischief Moles... I think you never heard it before, so I'm gonna teach it to you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, thank you! Right now or later?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Later.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, there's no stars.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh no, let me fix the stars. There. Stars!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so, the moles came out of their burrow and they saw a beautiful red and orange and yellow bird. And as it flew, it left a trail of flames and sparkles in the air. And it was burning, but without being hurt, because it was a bird made of fire: the flame bird.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And it said 'Cur-caw! Cur-caw! Follow me!'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what did they do? Did they follow the bird?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They followed the bird.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the bird flew up to the volcano, which was all quiet now, so that they could climb to the top. And Papa Mole said 'Maybe once we get to the top of the volcano, we'll see far all around us and that will help us make our map.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And now, I think we're out of time for tonight's stars and stories, so we'll have to continue that one another time.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: So if another volcano erupts in the morning, we can do the superhero songs from Danny Go.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That's true, we can. All right. Let's turn on the light.

characters.name: Papa Mole
characters.description: The wise leader and industrious architect of the Mischief Moles, this polite elder visionary guides his kin from the attic’s shadowed heights toward the stars and across biting, crystalline ice. A master pathfinder who initiated their voyage upon unearthing an ancient tome, he balances the weight of celestial navigation with the tactile craft of carving a new tunnel home and the thoughtful devotion of planning whimsical days of activities for his children. Whether introducing surprise robots for play, anchoring meditations during a frozen trek, or sleep-sitting in his favorite chair, his tactical brilliance ensures their furthest discoveries remain rooted in the rhythmic, quiet peace of a sanctuary built by his own seasoned hands.

characters.name: Disco
characters.description: An energetic Mischief Mole and superhero-clad detective, Disco is one of two identical twins who embark on grand adventures through the deep. Alongside her sister Thisco, this architect of the subterranean maps hidden realms—from frozen frontiers to the dusty canyons beneath the furniture—by piloting her signature submarine or racing toy cars through the bedroom's wild heights. Guided by "Cornebyborn" dances and Papa Mole’s lore, she finds solace within her glowing basket house, a dream sanctuary and fortress of a hundred locks. Whether navigating grimy domestic landscapes or open waters, Disco balances mechanical ingenuity with a persistent, soft-hearted wonder for the night sky.

characters.name: Thisco
characters.description: A brave and energetic Mischief Mole, this intrepid explorer serves as Disco’s dedicated partner on daring undersea adventures. Balancing a vital topographical mission with a penchant for planned mischief, he charts paths from the loamy forest floor to the aquarium’s glass-walled depths. He is as compassionate as he is whimsical, known for guiding wandering moss to sanctuary and crafting delicate, ephemeral butterflies from the very dust he unearths.

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Baby Mole
characters.description: The youngest mole, once carried by kin through a grueling mountain ascent to unearth a shimmering artifact of ancient magic, survived the world-scorching fires of a volcanic eruption by sheltering deep within the sanctuary of the burrow.

characters.name: Flame Bird
characters.description: A magical creature made of fire that guides the moles after the volcano erupts.

characters.name: Snisko
characters.description: A mole character from a story told within the main narrative.

characters.name: Fisko
characters.description: A mole character from a story told within the main narrative.

characters.name: Misko
characters.description: A mole character from a story told within the main narrative.

characters.name: Izzy the kiddo
characters.description: The brave young protagonist who emerged from the earthen depths alongside the moles to aid Hattie, Isabella remains a steadfast visitor whose melodic songs of courage bolster her friends.

places.name: The Burrow
places.description: A safe and cozy underground sanctuary for the Mischief Moles, tucked away within the protective cracks of a weathered stone wall.

places.name: The Plane of Fire
places.description: A scorching, sparkly realm filled with volcanoes, campfires, and bright floating lights.

places.name: The Plane of Water
places.description: A magical world contained within one of Seeker's enchanted potions.

places.name: The Plane of Ice
places.description: A frozen world of snow and ice contained within one of Seeker's enchanted potions.

places.name: The Plane of Grass
places.description: A beautiful world with enormous fields of sweet-smelling grass.

places.name: The Plane of Mud
places.description: A sticky world where moles dig for bugs in the dirt.
